launch_inputs.discovery_brief: Find credible external sources, product evidence, and operator signals that explain how enterprise teams evaluate agentic research and evidence-gathering tools today.
launch_inputs.target_scope: Prioritize sources that help Agirunner understand first-party workflow positioning, source trust, and operator-visible control expectations.
launch_inputs.search_constraints: Prefer current primary sources and direct evidence over summaries; if external search is available, use it before relying only on model memory or narrower paths.
